content: Tiny Tina's Assault on Dragon Keep
name: Cleric
description: Cleric is a common Siren class mod for Maya introduced in Tiny Tina's Assault on Dragon Keep. It is made by Bandit and is found only from treasure chests within that DLC area.
notes:
Earlier versions of the "Good" variant applied the opposite reload bonus, increasing reload time instead of improving it. This has since been corrected.

The name references a tabletop cleric archetype, fitting its focus on mixing combat support with healing, which complements Maya's sustain and support tools.

special.description:
At maximum level, it rolls one bonus from each of two pools.

Pool 1: Neutral +58.5% magazine size; Chaotic +58.5% fire rate; Lawful +58.5% maximum accuracy.

Pool 2: Neutral +58.5% magazine size; Evil +58.5% critical hit damage; Good +58.5% reload speed.

The 2x magazine size prefix is True Neutral, giving +93.6% magazine size. The item card may show incorrect fire rate, reload speed, and accuracy values.
